notes: Live evidence for SavedSearch.filters projection of range comparators, exists syntax, bounded ranges expressed as two range tokens, negated non-equality range terms, and schema-valid filters.__typename values. The savedSearchCreate payloads and downstream productSavedSearches read both select filters { __typename key value }, proving staged saved-search records expose SearchFilter typename plus the same parsed filters/searchTerms projection.
